case_title: CHARLES M. MEEKINS VS. RAV INVESTIGATIVE & SECURITY SERVICES,LTD, A NEW

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEEKINS, CHARLES M. AS TO DEFENDANT RAV INVESTIGATIVE & SECURITY SERVICES,LTD, A NEW YORK CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEEKINS, CHARLES M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAV INVESTIGATIVE & SECURITY SERVICES,LTD, A NEW YORK CORPORATION $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
